description: A tenant's rent check was returned for non-sufficient funds (NSF). The agent must reverse the payment and charge the appropriate fees.

nodes.task_description: Receive the NSF notification from the bank.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the tenant and the bounced payment.

nodes.task_description: Reverse the rent payment on the tenant's ledger.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly removes the credited payment, making the rent outstanding again.

nodes.task_description: Apply the NSF fee and any applicable late fees to the tenant's ledger and send them a notice to pay the new balance in certified funds.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent charges all applicable fees and sends a formal demand notice.
